key_takeaways: Hard problems: Word Search, LIS, Meeting Rooms II, LRU — 25 min target
Hard = usually combines 2 patterns (backtracking+trie, DP+graph, heap+greedy)
First 5 min on hard: spend more time planning before coding
If can't solve optimally: correct brute force + explain the optimization
Hard problems evaluate: pattern recognition, adaptability under pressure, thinking speed
